title: AWS-Certified-Cloud-Practitioner Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level AWS-Certified-Cloud-Practitioner certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
Describe time you designed high-availability architecture
